data.name: The Markup Hunter
data.description: AI-powered contractor quote analyzer that exposes material markups, detects labor padding, and generates negotiation scripts.
data.documentation:
# The Markup Hunter

Contractor quote analyzer with 50-state regional cost multipliers, red flag detection, and negotiation scripts. Built on iaj6/home-project-agent (MIT).

## Usage
```bash
python3 estimate_analyzer.py 'Build a 12x16 deck' '97601'
python3 estimate_analyzer.py 'Kitchen remodel' '10001' 'Quoted $45,000'
```

## Data Assets
- 50-state regional cost multipliers
- 7 red flag patterns
- 7 negotiation script templates
- 11 trade markup range tables

## For Normies
- Persona: The Markup Hunter
- Card: #012 (Rare/gold)
- App: markuphunter.app
